theme_and_archetype.description: Serious, visionary, engineering-first. Emulates a mission control console and systems engineering diagram. High-trust, objective, data-dense without military/patriotic cliches.

rules: Never center headings globally; strictly left-align for a systematic, technical feel.
Use mono-spaced fonts for metrics, statuses, navigation overlines, and labels.
Do not use ultra-bold or black weights for headings; stick to Medium or SemiBold to retain engineering precision.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Mode B: The 'Control Room' Grid - sharp, dense, utilized space. Gap-4 to Gap-6.
layout_and_spacing.borders: 1px solid #27272a. Grid borders exposed. Technical skeleton look.
layout_and_spacing.radii: rounded-none or rounded-sm. Deep tech UI must remain sharp and structural.
layout_and_spacing.shadows: Minimal. Avoid soft blurs. Use solid offsets or pure 1px glow on active state.

hero.layout: Left-aligned content block (max-w-2xl) taking up 60% of the screen. Absolute positioned canvas animation in the background.
hero.background_animation: Use react-tsparticles or raw HTML5 canvas to draw a 'distributed node and edge topology network'. Thin, low-opacity white/blue lines connecting dots (agents) that slowly drift and reconnect. Do NOT use stock video.

capability_cards.layout: Bento-style or strict CSS grid. Surface: #0f0f11. Border: 1px solid #27272a.
capability_cards.status_badge: Top right corner. Text: 'RESEARCH & PROTOTYPING'. Font: font-mono text-[10px]. Color: text-amber-500 bg-amber-500/10 border border-amber-500/20 px-2 py-1.

principles_grid.layout: Dense 2x3 or 3x2 grid. border-collapse behavior (shared borders). Minimal padding (p-6 or p-8) inside each cell. Each principle numbered (e.g., '01', '02') in font-mono.

roadmap.layout: Vertical timeline mimicking a system topology graph. Nodes on the left edge with lines connecting phases downward. Phase numbers in monospace.
roadmap.visuals: Use SVG lines bridging content blocks.

blog_cards.layout: Flat card, no image or minimal abstract CSS geometry. Focus on title, abstract, and heavily visible tags/categories.

admin_dashboard.layout: Sidebar navigation. Dense data tables (Shadcn UI). Flat surface backgrounds. Use standard Shadcn components heavily customized to be sharp (rounded-sm) and stark.
admin_dashboard.tables: Mono-spaced IDs and dates. Clear status dots.

navigation_header.layout: Sticky, glassmorphism (bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-md), bottom border (border-b border-white/10). Explicit navigation links on desktop.

motion_and_interactions.philosophy: Subtle, performant, linear. Deep tech does not bounce.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Color shifts (border brightening), slight opacity changes. Use text-white for hover on text-secondary.
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Simple opacity fade-in for structural elements. Staggered reveal for grid items.

media_and_assets.imagery_rules: Strictly NO drone stock footage, NO military camo, NO weapons. Use abstract geometric generations, data topology, dark server racks, or code snippets for visual filler.
media_and_assets.logo: Text-based logotype using font-mono or a stark sans-serif. e.g. '[ iphysys ]' or 'iphysys //'

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the hero background using TSParticles (react-tsparticles) configured for a slow-moving node/edge network (links between particles).
All interactive elements MUST have 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button').
Configure Tailwind CSS to use the specific color tokens listed here.
Use Shadcn UI for forms, tables, and dialogs but strip out the default radii (override to rounded-sm) and box-shadows to fit the brutalist/technical theme.
Ensure dark mode is the default and only mode (force dark scheme).
